creator: freebsd-ports@andre.rikkertdekoe.nl
text:
Created attachment 189566
New port textproc/py-yamllint in shar format

These (py-yamllint and py-pathspec in a separate submit) are my first python ports. I followed the porters handbook and tested the ports on freebsd 10.3 and 11.1. Please let me know if did something wrong with the python version 2 vs 3 handling if that was the case. Then I will fix that.

Thanks,
Andre
